# GitHub Copilot Instructions

## Commit Message Rules

- **Do NOT** add `Co-authored-by: Copilot <...>` trailers to any commit message.
- **Do NOT** add `Co-authored-by: Claude <...>` or any AI assistant attribution trailers.
- Commit messages should only contain the author's own name and attribution.

## Format

```
<type>: <short description>

<optional body>
```

No AI co-author trailers. Ever.
